{{Quote|Target the Temple, Captain Meeshal.|[[Darth Stryfe]] to Captain Meeshal|<ref name="Legacy 17">[[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]]</ref>}}
'''Meeshal''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] to [[Darth Krayt]] and the [[One Sith]]. He served under the command of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Stryfe]].<ref name="Legacy 16" />

Captain Meeshal aided Lord Stryfe when the latter was sent by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Krayt to search for remnants of the [[New Jedi Order]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] and destroy them.<ref name="Legacy 16" /> At Stryfe's command, he<ref name="CSWE" /> gave the order to target and bombard the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|temple]].<ref name="Legacy 17" />

==Behind the scenes==
Meeshal's appearance and name are based on [[Mish'al Samman]], the real life "Commanding Officer" of the Saudi Arabian Outpost of the real-world [[501st Legion (fan organization)|501st Legion]].<ref name="FBP">{{WebCite|url=https://www.fanboyplanet.com/comics/mc-mishalstarwars.php|text=A Long Time Ago On A Fanboy Planet Far, Far Away…|author=Derek McCaw|date=2007-09-13|work=[https://fanboyplanet.com Fanboy Planet]|archivedate=20080906090159|nolive=1}}</ref>
